LanguageData.TW_Mech_MechTeslaCentipede.label: Gestate Tesla Centipede
LanguageData.TW_Mech_MechTeslaCentipede.description: Modified from a Glitterworld-era Tesla defense network prototype, this mechanized centipede was designed as an orbital drop-troop interceptor. After centuries of dormancy, it was reactivated by unknown signals. Its dorsal superconducting capacitors discharge multi-megavolt currents capable of vaporizing incoming artillery shells. However, its energy systems critically depend on electromagnetic stability - EMP impacts trigger cascading capacitor explosions through catastrophic overload.
